scope: wave-fanout migration: legacy's conservative allow-list of customer discovery + 2 GAQL search resources only; arbitrary GAQL and the full Google Ads resource/reporting surface are out of scope, matching legacy's own deliberate restriction. campaigns/ad_groups are declared method GET (not the literal wire HTTP verb, which is POST for a GAQL googleAds:search call) to correctly signal READ semantics to connectorgen validate's capabilities.write/read cross-check (design SS E.1 rule 4) -- GAQL search is a read operation carried over a POST request, so the wire verb alone cannot distinguish it from a mutation.

excluded.reason: Pass B capability expansion; legacy only implements the paginated search endpoint
Pass B capability expansion; legacy has no write support
